string.text:
A compact assault rifle that has been in service with Russian police forces from 1993 until now. It is used as a cheaper and more versatile alternative to the SR-3 "Vikhr". It can switch between semi-auto and fully automatic fire, and mount a variety of optics and suppressors.
 
 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES: 
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Faction type: %c[ui_gray_2]Warsaw Pact
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]KBP Instrument Design Bureau

A 9x39mm suppressed sniper rifle developed by the Russian KBP Instrument Design Bureau as a low-cost alternative to the VSS rifle. The rifle is based on the 9A-91 carbine. The VSK-94 was designed to accurately engage unarmoured targets at ranges up to 400m.
 
 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES: 
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Faction type: %c[ui_gray_2]Warsaw Pact
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]KBP Instrument Design Bureau
